m_i2c_slave: if (addr == I2C_ADDR) begin  // address match, goto ack
pcap2rgmii: output reg        sop,       // pulse with first character
output            eop,       // pulse with last  character
input      [15:0] ipg_len,   // inter packet gap (delay after CRC)
integer      cap_length;     // blocking: captured packet length in bytes
integer      org_length;     // blocking: original length in bytes
// check magic signature to determine byte ordering
end else if (f_hdr[0] == 8'hA1 && f_hdr[1] == 8'hB2 && f_hdr[2] == 8'hC3) begin
end else if (f_hdr[0] == 8'h4D && f_hdr[1] == 8'h3C && f_hdr[2] == 8'hb2) begin
tb_bpf: reg     [7:0] tb_pram [0:(1 << BPF_PRAM_ADDR_W)-1];    // packet memory mirror
// initialize instruction memory with debug data
// '-b' flag: bypass bpfc validation (allows more than 16 scratch pad words)
// initialize packet memory with debug data
bpf_pram_wdata  = {j, k+4'h3, j, k+4'h2, j, k+4'h1, j, k};
tb_lcd: parameter LCD_PRAM_ADDR_W  = 14; // packet ram bank addr width (8b words, 3x16Kx8) not used
tb_pcap: wire [15:0] mon_frmtype;        // if non-null: type field instead length

notes: Could not infer RTL top module, so packet interface inference is limited.
